task_completion.description: Open and read the IOTA prediction instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open displaying the contents of 'iota_prediction.txt' from the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Locate the target star and asteroid in the astronomy software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Astronomy/planetarium software (e.g., KStars) is open and centered on the target 'TYC 6815-00874-1' or '(52) Europa', or the coordinates RA 17h 12m / Dec -24d 51m.

task_completion.description: Configure the camera for rapid-cadence capture according to the prediction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera capture module (e.g., Ekos) shows the exposure time set to 2 seconds and the filter set to Slot 1 (Clear/Luminance).

task_completion.description: Capture the rapid-cadence image sequence of the occultation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The capture software shows a sequence running/completed with at least 40 frames, or a file manager shows a large number of FITS files saved in '/home/ga/Images/occultations/52europa/'.

task_completion.description: Generate the required sky view of the target area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An exported image file, FITS viewer, or sky map screenshot showing the star field around the target is visible or saved.
A text editor is open showing the created 'iota_occultation_report.txt' in the Documents directory, containing observation details.

integrity.description: The agent used actual astronomy GUI software to locate the target and capture images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with planetarium/capture software (like KStars/Ekos), not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely captured the image sequence using the camera interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for capture progress bars or sequence jobs in the GUI. The agent should not use terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to fake the creation of FITS files.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or exported the observation report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be visible in a text editor or generated by a tool, rather than being a direct copy-paste of the prompt via terminal echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: (52) Europa occulting TYC 6815-00874-1. Coordinates: RA 17.2117h (17h 12m 42s), Dec -24.8583deg (-24d 51m 30s). Required Capture Settings: Filter Slot 1 (Clear/Luminance), Exposure: 2 seconds. Output Directory for Images: /home/ga/Images/occultations/52europa/ (must contain at least 40 FITS files). Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/iota_occultation_report.txt.
